steps: File NTA Form 11 refund application with MUFG Custody for JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo dividends
Submit JP-NO treaty documentation showing 10% rate applies versus 15% standard rate withheld
Reference account 2401234567 and ISIN JP3902900004 in all correspondence to MUFG Custody
Follow up within 30 days if no acknowledgment received from custodian or Japanese tax authorities

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
NTA – Application Forms for Income Tax Convention (Form 1 for dividends)
